summary: User Blocking Feature testing complete. All backend endpoints (POST/DELETE/GET /api/block/{username}) work correctly. Frontend UI (block button, confirmation dialog, profile unavailable state) all functioning properly.
test_credentials: Dynamic test users created and deleted during tests
seed_data_creation: Test users created via API during testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Blocking feature fully tested and working. Backend: POST /api/block/{username} creates block and removes mutual follows, DELETE /api/block/{username} removes block, GET /api/block/check/{username} returns is_blocked/is_blocked_by status. Blocked users get 403 on profile/records/spins/iso/dreaming/posts endpoints. Frontend: Block button (data-testid='block-btn') appears on other users' profiles, NOT on own profile. Block confirmation dialog (data-testid='block-confirm-dialog') shows proper warning. Profile Unavailable state (data-testid='profile-unavailable') displays when blocked user tries to view blocker's profile. Feed and My Kinda People endpoints filter out blocked users (uses get_all_blocked_ids helper). Account deletion cleans up block records.

frontend: Block button (data-testid='block-btn') appears on other users' profiles
Block button does NOT appear on own profile
Block confirmation dialog (data-testid='block-confirm-dialog') appears with correct message
Profile shows 'Profile Unavailable' (data-testid='profile-unavailable') when blocked user views blocker

backend_endpoints.POST /api/block/{username}: Creates block record, removes mutual follows, returns {status: 'blocked'} or {status: 'already_blocked'}

blocking_feature_implementation_verified.feed_filtering: Feed endpoint uses get_all_blocked_ids to exclude blocked users' posts
blocking_feature_implementation_verified.my_kinda_people_filtering: My Kinda People endpoint excludes blocked users from recommendations
blocking_feature_implementation_verified.account_deletion_cleanup: DELETE /api/auth/account deletes all blocks involving the user
